title: The Way of the Samurai
author: Elisabetta Dami
desc: Geronimo travels to Japan to help his friend Wild Willie protect an ancient karate secret hidden in a samurai castle! 🥷

q.en: Who calls Geronimo on a Saturday night and drags him into a new adventure?
q.zh: 是谁在周六晚上打电话给杰罗尼摩，把他拉进一场新冒险的？

options.en: His nephew Benjamin according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 他的侄子本杰明（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: Wild Willie phones Geronimo at home and orders him to meet at South Paw Square for an adventure.
explain.zh: 野威利在家里打电话给杰罗尼摩，命令他到爪爪广场见面，开始一场冒险。

q.en: Where does Wild Willie tell Geronimo to meet him that night?
q.zh: 野威利让杰罗尼摩当晚去哪里和他碰面？

explain.en: Willie says, 'meet me tonight at eight thirty at 18 South Paw Square.'
explain.zh: 野威利说：“今晚八点半到爪爪广场18号来见我。”

q.en: What is Wild Willie's secret karate name, shown by his tattoo?
q.zh: 野威利在空手道中的秘密名字是什么？他的纹身也显示了这一点。

explain.en: Wild Willie rolls up his sleeve to reveal a red dragon tattoo and tells his teacher, 'I am RED DRAGON.'
explain.zh: 野威利卷起袖子，露出一条红龙的纹身，并对师傅说：“我就是红龙。”

q.en: Who are Chop Chop and Lotus Snout in the story?
q.zh: 故事里的乔普·乔普和莲花鼻是谁？

options.en: Spies working for the ninja according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 为忍者工作的间谍（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: The owners of the karate dojo

explain.en: Willie warns Geronimo not to embarrass himself in front of his friends Chop Chop and Lotus Snout, adding, 'It's their dojo.'
explain.zh: 野威利提醒杰罗尼摩别在朋友乔普·乔普和莲花鼻面前丢脸，并说：“这是他们的道场。”

q.en: What is wasabi, the green paste Geronimo eats by mistake?
q.zh: 杰罗尼摩误吃的那团绿色酱料“山葵”到底是什么？

options.en: A very spicy Japanese paste like horseradish
options.zh: 一种像辣根一样非常辛辣的日式酱料

options.en: A sweet fruit jam according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 一种甜甜的水果酱（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: The book explains wasabi is a very spicy Japanese paste made from a greenish root, similar in flavor to horseradish.
explain.zh: 书中说明，山葵是一种用绿色根茎制成的非常辛辣的日式酱料，味道类似辣根。

q.en: What happens after Geronimo swallows the wasabi?
q.zh: 杰罗尼摩吞下山葵后发生了什么？

options.en: Flames shoot from his mouth and burn Shrewdpaws's toupee
options.zh: 火苗从他嘴里喷出来，烧着了精明爪的假发

options.en: He wins a karate match according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 他赢了一场空手道比赛（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: The wasabi is so spicy that flames shoot out of Geronimo's mouth and set Shrewdpaws's toupee on fire; Willie pours tea on his head.
explain.zh: 山葵太辣了，火苗从杰罗尼摩嘴里喷出，烧着了精明爪的假发；野威利用茶浇在他的头上灭火。

q.en: What is the capital of Japan, where the friends first arrive?
q.zh: 朋友们首先到达的日本首都是哪里？

explain.en: They fly to Tokyo, the capital of Japan, and admire its skyscrapers before heading south to Okinawa.
explain.zh: 他们飞到日本的首都东京，欣赏完摩天大楼后，再往南前往冲绳。

q.en: How fast can the Japanese bullet train, the Shinkansen, travel?
q.zh: 日本的子弹头列车“新干线”能跑多快？

options.en: About 500 miles per hour according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 大约每小时500英里（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: Chop Chop tells Geronimo the Shinkansen, or bullet train, travels as fast as 186 miles an hour.
explain.zh: 乔普·乔普告诉杰罗尼摩，新干线这种子弹头列车时速可达186英里。

q.en: In Geronimo's dream, who makes him a real samurai?
q.zh: 在杰罗尼摩的梦里，是谁封他为真正的武士的？

options.en: Wild Willie according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 野威利（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: In the dream, the shogun Hanshi declares, 'You are now a samurai!' after Geronimo promises to follow the way of the samurai.
explain.zh: 在梦里，汉希将军在杰罗尼摩发誓遵循武士之道后，宣布：“你现在是一名武士了！”

q.en: What ancient karate technique does the secret parchment teach?
q.zh: 那张秘密羊皮卷传授的古老空手道技巧是什么？

options.en: Swimming according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 游泳（按书中另一种说法）
一种按压穴位防身的点穴术

explain.en: Willie translates the parchment and names the technique 'Tuite,' which uses pressure points so the weak can overcome the strong.
explain.zh: 野威利翻译羊皮卷，把这种技巧叫作“点穴术”，靠按压穴位让弱小者也能制服强者。
